title: koelreuteria bipinnata var. apiculata
intro: Koelreuteria bipinnata var. apiculata, also known as the variegated goldenrain tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, prevent infections, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Koelreuteria bipinnata var. apiculata include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, roots, and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
